signatureMove.name: Destiny Fulfilled
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is slain, this character is Removed from Play.

abilities.name: Undying
abilities.description: Each time this character would be slain, instead restore all Wds. Then, if this character was in possession of any Moonstones, it drops one of them as if it were slain.

abilities.name: Seen It All Before
abilities.description: If this character is attacker or defender in a round of melee, before each player selects their combat card, your opponent must reveal their hand.

abilities.name: Visions of the Future
abilities.description: Target other friendly character immediately suffers one Catastrophe printed on their card. If it requires a target, you may choose any target that meets the ability's requirements.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target suffers X Magical Dmg and gains Slow until end of turn.
This character restores 1 Wd. The target restores 2 Wds.
